subject: CloudStack Sandbox API Credentials - Secure Exchange Request
body:
Hi Vendor Relations Team,

CloudStack has offered sandbox API credentials for integration testing with our platform. We need to coordinate the exchange of these credentials through our approved secure channel.

Please arrange for the credentials to be delivered via our 1Password shared vault (NOT via email or any other insecure method). This ensures the sensitive authentication data is protected and handled in accordance with our security policies.

Next steps:
1. Confirm your readiness to receive the credentials through the 1Password shared vault
2. Provide the email addresses/account details of team members who need access
3. Coordinate with CloudStack vendor to deliver credentials to our vault

Please let me know once you're ready to proceed with the secure credential exchange.

Thanks,
Internal Communications
